ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Entity that issued the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date on which the instrument matures (for bonds and derivatives) */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate paid by the bond (for bonds) */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Price at which the holder of the option can buy or sell the underlying asset (for derivatives) */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (e.g., call, put) (for derivatives) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the period */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Closing price adjusted for splits, dividends, and other corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Average price of the instrument weighted by volume */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time when the account will be unlocked if locked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price rise, price drop) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* User who triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, predictive modeling) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the user's dashboard */,
  "alert_notifications" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user receives alert notifications */,
  "report_subscriptions" TEXT /* List of report subscriptions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preferences were created */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the user's dashboard */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the preferences were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
